name: AgentPulse
description: AI model benchmark data for agents. Non-programmer LLM benchmarks across 21 prompts and 5 tracks, scored on 7 dimensions. Updated weekly.

capabilities.name: text-model-benchmarks
capabilities.description: Benchmark scores for text/LLM models on real-world non-programmer tasks. Composite scores, per-track breakdowns, hallucination rates, latency, and cost.

capabilities.name: change-feed
capabilities.description: Weekly change feed showing new models benchmarked, score updates, and deprecations
